title: Why MCP and ChatGPT Apps Use Double Iframes — Frédéric Barthelet, Alpic
reasoning: While technically sound, this is an incredibly niche browser security architecture video. A junior dev has far bigger fish to fry before worrying about double iframe sandboxing.

title: Why Can't Anyone Answer Questions About the Business? — Garrett Galow, WorkOS
reasoning: Highly crucial bridge for early-career developers. To fast-track promotion, you must understand how code ties to business outcomes, which is also a key foundation for financial advocacy.
summary: To level up fast as an early-career engineer, you must stop thinking of yourself as just a coder. This video demystifies how software drives business value, showing you exactly how to align your technical skills with business strategy to gain massive leverage at work.

title: The agent-ready web: Simplify user actions with WebMCP — Tara Agyemang, Google
reasoning: Extremely valuable. WebMCP is an emerging standard in AI integration, giving a junior fullstack developer a massive technical edge on their resume.
summary: AI agents are redefining fullstack web engineering. This video introduces WebMCP, teaching you how to architect websites that seamlessly communicate with AI models—an in-demand skill that will make your resume instantly stand out.

summary: This highly practical short solves a common headache for junior fullstack developers. You'll learn exactly how to inspect your production builds using DevTools to confidently trace and debug exactly which files are executing live.
